prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约2580→2331→1816→2326→2951，2023年曾冲高至1816名，但近两年持续后移，2025年较2024年后移约625名，基准位次约2951名；该校在吉林省物理类（含理科）招生计划：2021年54人、2022年57人、2023年59人、2024年59人、2025年59人；2026年计划62人，较2025年扩招约5.1%，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第13名（Top20），近年排名稳定在第11–13名区间，属国内顶尖高校梯队；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（论文数据存疑等），但2025年周期评价偏正面（校方积极回应舆情）；抖音热度排名第29位（较热），综合曝光量中等偏上；历史投档异常方面，2022年多省出现断档（中关注），2023年投档线异常（低关注），2025年广东考生报考热情受影响（中关注），负面舆情对报考心理有一定抑制作用；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共23个学科：生态学A+、工商管理A+、中国语言文学A、公共卫生与预防医学A、基础医学A、数学A、物理学A、生物学A、药学A、马克思主义理论A，以及临床医学A-、哲学A-、法学A-、计算机科学与技术A-等，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学等热门专业持续高热推荐，与中山大学优势学科高度匹配；吉林省2026年高考总考生约110868人，较2025年（约111492人）基本持平，竞争环境稳定；中山大学位于广东省广州市，属华南地区顶尖高校；该校在吉林省招生占比约1.5%（2025年），属跨省招生，地域偏好对吉林考生报考影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2951名、2026年扩招约5.1%（推高位次）、学校层次极高与优势学科众多（吸引竞争、拉低位次）、声誉舆情偏负面（抑制报考热情）等多因素，扩招与竞争吸引力大致抵消；预测2026年物理类最低位次约3041名，区间2694–3388名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 2580 → 2331 → 1816 → 2326 → 2951. In 2023, it peaked at 1816, but has declined in the past two years. In 2025, it shifted back by about 625 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 2951. The enrollment plan for Physics Category (including Science) in Jilin Province: 54 in 2021, 57 in 2022, 59 in 2023, 59 in 2024, 59 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 62, an increase of about 5.1% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 13th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 11th–13th range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. The reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (questionable paper data, etc.), but the 2025 cycle evaluation is somewhat positive (the university actively responded to public opinion). Douyin popularity ranking is 29th (relatively hot), with overall exposure at a medium-high level. Regarding historical admission anomalies, multiple provinces experienced gaps in 2022 (medium attention), abnormal admission lines in 2023 (low attention), and affected enthusiasm of Guangdong candidates in 2025 (medium attention). Negative public opinion has a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 23 disciplines rated A- or above: Ecology A+, Business Administration A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A, Basic Medicine A, Mathematics A, Physics A, Biology A, Pharmacy A, Marxist Theory A, as well as Clinical Medicine A-, Philosophy A-, Law A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, etc. The university has strong disciplinary strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine continue to be highly recommended, highly matching Sun Yat-sen University's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam candidates in Jilin Province is approximately 110,868, basically unchanged from 2025 (approximately 111,492), with a stable competitive environment. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou City, Guangdong Province, a top university in South China. Its enrollment proportion in Jilin Province is about 1.5% (2025), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with regional preference having a neutral impact on Jilin candidates' applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2951, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 5.1% (pushing up the ranking), the very high university level and numerous advantageous disciplines (attracting competition, pulling down the ranking), and the somewhat negative reputation and public opinion (suppressing application enthusiasm), the expansion and competitive attraction roughly offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 3041, with a range of 2694–3388.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2694–3388, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2600), you can focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors like Clinical Medicine 8-year program; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 3300), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 and Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 799 → 500 → 449 → 386 → 542. From 2021 to 2024, the ranking continuously moved forward (from 799th to 386th), but in 2025 it significantly moved backward by about 156 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 542. The university's enrollment plan for History Category (including Liberal Arts) in Jilin Province: 20 students in 2021, 20 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 18 in 2024, and 18 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 16 students, a reduction of about 11.1% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 13th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. The reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents; the 2025 cycle evaluation is somewhat positive. Douyin popularity ranking is 29th (relatively popular). Regarding historical admission anomalies, there were gaps in multiple provinces in 2022 (medium attention), abnormal admission lines in 2023 (low attention), and affected enthusiasm of Guangdong candidates in 2025 (medium attention). Sun Yat-sen University has outstanding strength in humanities and social sciences: Business Administration A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Marxist Theory A, Philosophy A-, Law A-, Sociology A-, Applied Economics A-, Foreign Language and Literature A-, etc., strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature, and Teacher Training/Education are socially hot or recommended, highly matching Sun Yat-sen University's advantageous liberal arts disciplines. The total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Jilin Province is approximately 110,868, basically unchanged from 2025. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, a top university in South China. The university enrolls a small number of History Category students in Jilin Province (16 planned for 2026), with limited cross-provincial enrollment scale, and regional preference has a neutral impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 542, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 11.1% (intensifying competition, pulling ranking forward), the university's extremely high level and outstanding liberal arts disciplines (attracting competition, further pulling ranking forward), the enrollment reduction and university attractiveness jointly drive the ranking forward. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 506, with a range of 448–564.
